originalTitle: Stock pickers know they can’t outsmart the market. That doesn’t stop them from trying.
summary: How to satisfy your inner trader without derailing your long-term investment goals.
content: How to satisfy your inner trader without derailing your long-term investment goals.
chineseTitle: 选股者知道他们无法智胜市场。这并不能阻止他们尝试。
chineseSummary: 如何在不影响您长期投资目标的情况下满足您的内心交易者需求。
chineseContent: 如何在不影响您长期投资目标的情况下满足您的内心交易者需求。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
